metadata.id: string (UUID) - Unique identifier for the grant definition
metadata.enabledInProd: boolean - Whether this grant is enabled in production
metadata.referenceNumberPrefix: string - Prefix for generated reference numbers

cookieConsent.enabled: boolean - Whether cookie consent is enabled
cookieConsent.serviceName: string - Name of the service for cookie consent
cookieConsent.cookiePolicyUrl: string - URL to cookie policy page
cookieConsent.expiryDays: number - Number of days before cookies expire

submission.grantCode: string - Unique code identifying this grant
submission.submissionSchemaPath: string - Path to JSON schema for submission validation

grantRedirectRules.preSubmission: array - Rules for redirecting before submission
grantRedirectRules.postSubmission: array - Rules for redirecting after submission based on grant and GAS status
grantRedirectRules.excludedPaths: array - Paths excluded from redirect rules

confirmationContent.html: string - HTML content for confirmation page

metadata.whitelistCrnEnvVar: string - Environment variable name for CRN whitelist
metadata.whitelistSbiEnvVar: string - Environment variable name for SBI whitelist

query.name: string - Name of the query
query.entities: array - Entities to query with variable mappings

detailsPage.responseMapping: object - Maps response data to internal structure
detailsPage.displaySections: array - Sections to display on details page with fields

tasklist.completeInOrder: boolean - Whether tasks must be completed in order
tasklist.returnAfterSection: boolean - Whether to return to task list after each section
tasklist.showCompletionStatus: boolean - Whether to show completion status

cannotStart.text: string - Display text for cannot start status
cannotStart.classes: string - CSS classes for cannot start status

notStarted.text: string - Display text for not started status
notStarted.classes: string - CSS classes for not started status

completed.text: string - Display text for completed status
completed.classes: string - CSS classes for completed status
